---
title: "Simulations Figures"
author: "Filippo Monti"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%Y-%m-%d')`"
output:
  pdf_document:
    keep_tex: true
    latex_engine: pdflatex
    toc: yes
    highlight: tango
    df_print: kable
fontsize: 11pt
geometry: margin=1.2in
editor_options:
  markdown:
    wrap: 72
header-includes:
  - \usepackage[ruled,vlined,linesnumbered]{algorithm2e}
  - \usepackage{bm}
---
::: hidden $$ \renewcommand{\bm}[1]{\boldsymbol{#1}} $$ :::

```{r, setup, include=FALSE}
# Stable, zero-edit setup for any machine
set.seed(666)
options(stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
Sys.setlocale("LC_TIME", "C")

# Load small helpers without hard-coded paths
stopifnot(requireNamespace("fs", quietly = TRUE))
stopifnot(requireNamespace("rprojroot", quietly = TRUE))

# Resolve repo root and code dir; source libraries and paths
root <- rprojroot::find_root(
  rprojroot::has_file(".git") |
    rprojroot::has_dir("code")
)

# Prefer R_code/, else code/R_code/
R_path <- fs::path(root, "code", "R_code")
sapply(file.path(R_path, c("R_libraries.R", "R_paths.R")), source)
r_files <- list.files(path = R_functions_path, pattern = "\\.R$", full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)
r_files <- append(r_files, list.files(path = R_classes_path, pattern = "\\.R$", full.names = TRUE))
for (r_file in r_files) source(r_file)
```

<!-- 
file.edit("/Users/filippomonti/Desktop/suchard_lab/NonParametricModelingOfCTMCs/code/R_code/R_Figures/benchmarksFigures.qmd") 
-->
# Preliminaries
### Fonts Upload
```{r, fonts, include=FALSE}
loadCmuSerif
```

```{r}
# sysfonts::font_add("CMU Serif", regular = "/Users/filippomonti/Library/Fonts/cmunrm.otf")
# showtext_auto()   # automatically enables showtext for all devices
```
### Parameters
```{r}
xmlNameGp <- "simulation_GP" #nprSimulationHostDistanceConvex2
xmlNameGlm <- "simulation_LL" #nprSimulationGlmHostDistanceConvex2
```

```{bash}
#cp /Users/filippomonti/Desktop/AdditiveGaussianProcesses/output/log/nprSimulationGlmHostDistanceConvex2.log /Users/filippomonti/Desktop/npCTMC/output/nprSimulGp.log
#cd /Users/filippomonti/Desktop/try_download/nprSimulationHostDistanceConvex2/Gp_E_HostDistance_HMC_1_1_1_1
#cp nprSimulationHostDistanceConvex2.log /Users/filippomonti/Desktop/npCTMC/output/simulation_GP.log
``` 

# Simulation Models
```{r}
simulation = "on"
jobsAttributes <- list("mana" = "Gp", "predictorName" = c("HostDistance"))
additionalAttributes <- list("msim" = "lrm", "nstates" = as.vector(17)) 
additionalAttributes <- append(additionalAttributes, list("tree" = "rabies", 
                        "dataType" = "Alph", "align_length" = 0, 
                        "shape" = "Convex"))
```

### Log Linear
```{r}
path_to_log <- file.path(input_path, paste0(xmlNameGlm, ".log"))
jobsAttributes$mana <- "Glm"
for (r_file in r_files) source(r_file)
PJL <- AnalyserFromLog$new(project = "NPRates", path = path_to_log,
                          jobsAttributes = jobsAttributes, additionalAttributes = additionalAttributes,
                          burnIn = 0.5, thinning = 1, burnOut = 1,
                          plottingFlags = list(plottingLogRates = TRUE),#, plottingRatesLogRates=TRUE),
                          actions = list(normalize=FALSE, exponentiate = FALSE, simulation = "on",
                                         publicationQuality = TRUE, addClockRate = FALSE))

# mcmcEval <- PJL$mcmc(1)
ll_hostModel <- PJL$getData(1) |> dplyr::select(starts_with("host.model"))
# p <- PJL$plotter()
# print(mcmcEval$ESSSorted())
summ_data_LL <- createPlottingDataLogRates(PJL$getDataToPlot(), addPredictor = TRUE, addTrueline = TRUE)
```

### Gaussian Process
```{r}
jobsAttributes$mana <- "Gp"
path_to_log <- file.path(input_path, paste0(xmlNameGp, ".log"))

# PJL <- AnalyserJobsList$new(project = "NPRates", path = path_to_xml,
#                           # attributes = attributes,
#                           jobsAttributes = jobsAttributes, additionalAttributes = additionalAttributes,
#                           burnIn = 0.5, thinning = 1, burnOut = 1,
#                           plottingFlags = list(plottingLogRates = TRUE, plottingRatesLogRates=TRUE,
#                                                plottingDerivatives = FALSE),
#                           actions = list(normalize=TRUE,  useInput = FALSE,
#                                          simulation = simulation, publicationQuality = TRUE, 
#                                          centerData = FALSE, addClockRate = FALSE))
path_to_xml <- file.path(input_path, xmlNameGp)
PJL <- AnalyserFromLog$new(project = "NPRates", path = path_to_log,
                          jobsAttributes = jobsAttributes, additionalAttributes = additionalAttributes,
                          burnIn = 0.5, thinning = 1, burnOut = 1,
                          plottingFlags = list(plottingLogRates = TRUE),#, plottingRatesLogRates=TRUE),
                          actions = list(normalize=FALSE, exponentiate = FALSE, simulation = "on",
                                         publicationQuality = TRUE, addClockRate = FALSE))

# mcmcEval <- PJL$mcmc(1)
gp_hostModel <- PJL$getData(1) |> dplyr::select(starts_with("host.model")) 
# hyper_cols <- c(grep("hyper", colnames(mcmcEval$data), value = TRUE), "clock.rate")
# summary(mcmcEval$data[, hyper_cols])
# mcmcEval$ESSSorted()
summ_data_GP <- createPlottingDataLogRates(PJL$getDataToPlot(), addPredictor = TRUE, addTrueline = FALSE)
# p <- PJL$plotter()
# p$logRatesQuantiles
```

# Simulation Plot
```{r}
linesize = 0.5
library(mgcv)
summ_data_GP <- summ_data_GP %>%
 mutate(
   lowHPD = predict(gam(q05 ~ s(predictor, bs = "cs")), newdata = summ_data_GP),
   highHPD = predict(gam(q95 ~ s(predictor, bs = "cs")), newdata = summ_data_GP)
 )
myplot <- ggplot(summ_data_LL, aes(x = predictor)) +
  geom_ribbon(data = summ_data_GP, aes(ymin = lowHPD, ymax = highHPD), alpha = 0.5, fill = "darkgoldenrod1") +
  geom_line(data = summ_data_GP, aes(y = median, color = "c", linetype = "c"), size = linesize) +
  
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = q05, ymax = q95), alpha = 0.5, fill = "#94CBEc") +
  geom_line(aes(y = median, color = "b", linetype = "b"), size = linesize) +
  
  geom_line(aes(y = trueLine, color = "a", linetype = "a"), size = linesize, alpha=0.8) +
  
  labs(x = "Host genetic distance", y = "Log rates") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) + 
  scale_color_manual(
     name = "Legend",
     values = c("a" = "#337538", "b" = "#2F67B1", "c" = "#F8766D"), 
     labels = c("Truth", "LL", "GP")
   ) +
   scale_linetype_manual(
     name = "Legend",
     values = c("a" = "dashed", "b" = "solid", "c" = "solid"), 
     labels = c("Truth", "LL", "GP"), 
     guide = guide_legend(
      override.aes = list(linetype = c("22228222", "solid", "solid")))
   ) 
  

final_plot <- publicationQualitySettings(myplot) + theme(legend.position = c(1, 0.865), legend.justification = c(1, 1)) 
final_plot

gg_record(device = "pdf", width = 3, height = 2.5, units = "in", dpi = 300)   
print(final_plot)
gg_stop_recording()
```

```{r}
if (save_plots) {
  ggsave(
    filename = paste0(output_figures_path, "simulationLogRates", ".pdf"),
    plot = final_plot,
    width = 3, height = 2.5, dpi = 300
  )
}
```

# Computing RMSE
```{r}
# ---- Inputs ----
true <- as.numeric(summ_data_LL$trueLine)

rmse_from_draws <- function(M, true) {
  # M: draws x grid; returns vector of RMSE across draws
  rmse <- apply(M, 1, function(x) sqrt(mean((x - true)^2)))
  cat("RMSE\n")
  cat("Median = ", median(rmse), "\n")
  cat("Mean   = ", mean(rmse), "\n")
  cat("HPDI 95% = (", quantile(rmse, c(0.025, 0.975)), ")\n")
}

# Compute RMSE samples (you already have these, but here for completeness)
cat("GP Model:\n")
rmse_from_draws(gp_hostModel, true)
cat("\nLL Model:\n")
rmse_from_draws(ll_hostModel, true)
```


# Gradient Benchmark Timing

### Data

```{r benchmark-data, message=FALSE}
library(patchwork)

method_levels <- c("Exact", "Approximate", "torchtree", "treeflow", "PhyloGrad")

# ── Exact & Approximate (BEAST N=300 placeholders; Exact is replaced for N=100 rev) ────────────
beast_exact <- tibble(
  method    = "Exact",
  K         = c(8L, 16L, 32L, 64L, 128L),
  median_ms = c(0.71, 0.73, 0.73, 0.756, 2.699),
  sd_ms     = c(0.001, 0.006, 0.010, 0.104, 0.236)
)
beast_approx <- tibble(
  method    = "Approximate",
  K         = c(8L, 16L, 32L, 64L, 128L),
  median_ms = beast_exact$median_ms * 0.7,
  sd_ms     = beast_exact$sd_ms     * 0.7
)

# ── N=300 placeholder (used for cols 2 & 3, and for treeflow in col 1) ───────
fair_csv <- "/Users/filippomonti/Desktop/npctmcResub/npCTMC/code/benchmarks/rate_matrix_gradient/fair_comparison_results.csv"

placeholder <- read_csv(fair_csv, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    method    = case_when(
      str_starts(backend, "torchtree") ~ "torchtree",
      str_starts(backend, "treeflow")  ~ "treeflow",
      str_starts(backend, "phylograd") ~ "PhyloGrad",
      TRUE                             ~ backend
    ),
    K         = as.integer(state_count),
    median_ms = median_seconds * 1e3,
    sd_ms     = sd_seconds     * 1e3
  ) %>%
  select(method, K, median_ms, sd_ms)

# Columns 2 & 3: all methods from N=300 placeholder
bench_placeholder <- bind_rows(beast_exact, beast_approx, placeholder) %>%
  mutate(method = factor(method, levels = method_levels))

# ── Actual BEAST Exact data for N=100 and N=1000 ─────────────────────────────
beast_exact_n100_rev_csv <- "/Users/filippomonti/Desktop/npctmcResub/npCTMC/code/xml/gradient_timing_figures/n100_reversible_gradient_benchmark_force_all_real.csv"
beast_exact_n100_nonrev_csv <- "/Users/filippomonti/Desktop/npctmcResub/npCTMC/code/xml/gradient_timing_figures/n100_nonreversible_gradient_benchmark.csv"
beast_exact_n1000_rev_csv <- "/Users/filippomonti/Desktop/npctmcResub/npCTMC/code/xml/gradient_timing_figures/n1000_reversible_gradient_benchmark_force_all_real.csv"
beast_exact_n1000_nonrev_csv <- "/Users/filippomonti/Desktop/npctmcResub/npCTMC/code/xml/gradient_timing_figures/n1000_nonreversible_gradient_benchmark.csv"

read_beast_exact_benchmark <- function(path) {
  read_csv(path, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
    filter(dirty) %>%
    transmute(
      method    = "Exact",
      K         = as.integer(K),
      median_ms = p50_ms,
      sd_ms
    )
}

copy_as_approximate <- function(data) {
  data %>% mutate(method = "Approximate")
}

beast_exact_n100_rev <- read_beast_exact_benchmark(beast_exact_n100_rev_csv)
beast_exact_n100_nonrev <- read_beast_exact_benchmark(beast_exact_n100_nonrev_csv)
beast_approx_n100_rev <- copy_as_approximate(beast_exact_n100_rev)
beast_approx_n100_nonrev <- copy_as_approximate(beast_exact_n100_nonrev)

new_csv <- "/Users/filippomonti/Desktop/npctmcResub/npCTMC/code/benchmarks/rate_matrix_gradient/gradient_benchmarks_by_N.csv"

new_n100 <- read_csv(new_csv, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  filter(tip_count == 100) %>%
  mutate(
    method    = case_when(
      backend == "torchtree-reversible"    ~ "torchtree",
      backend == "torchtree-nonreversible" ~ "torchtree",
      backend == "phylograd-reversible"    ~ "PhyloGrad",
      backend == "treeflow"               ~ "treeflow"
    ),
    K         = as.integer(state_count),
    median_ms = median_seconds * 1e3,
    sd_ms     = sd_seconds     * 1e3
  ) %>%
  select(method, K, q_regime, median_ms, sd_ms)

# Column 1, Row 1 — Reversible: Exact, torchtree, PhyloGrad, and treeflow from N=100; Approx copied from Exact
bench_col1_rev <- bind_rows(
  beast_exact_n100_rev, beast_approx_n100_rev,
  new_n100 %>% filter(q_regime == "reversible") %>% select(-q_regime)
) %>%
  mutate(method = factor(method, levels = method_levels))

# Column 1, Row 2 — Non-reversible: Exact, torchtree, and treeflow from N=100; Approx copied from Exact
bench_col1_nonrev <- bind_rows(
  beast_exact_n100_nonrev, beast_approx_n100_nonrev,
  new_n100 %>% filter(q_regime == "nonreversible") %>% select(-q_regime)
) %>%
  mutate(method = factor(method, levels = method_levels))

# ── Actual N=1000 data (Exact from BEAST; torchtree + PhyloGrad, K=8–64) ─────
beast_exact_n1000_rev <- read_beast_exact_benchmark(beast_exact_n1000_rev_csv)
beast_exact_n1000_nonrev <- read_beast_exact_benchmark(beast_exact_n1000_nonrev_csv)
beast_approx_n1000_rev <- copy_as_approximate(beast_exact_n1000_rev)
beast_approx_n1000_nonrev <- copy_as_approximate(beast_exact_n1000_nonrev)

new_n1000 <- read_csv(new_csv, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  filter(tip_count == 1000) %>%
  mutate(
    method    = case_when(
      backend == "torchtree-reversible"    ~ "torchtree",
      backend == "torchtree-nonreversible" ~ "torchtree",
      backend == "phylograd-reversible"    ~ "PhyloGrad",
      backend == "treeflow"               ~ "treeflow"
    ),
    K         = as.integer(state_count),
    median_ms = median_seconds * 1e3,
    sd_ms     = sd_seconds     * 1e3
  ) %>%
  select(method, K, q_regime, median_ms, sd_ms)

# Column 2, Row 1 — Reversible: Exact, torchtree, PhyloGrad, and treeflow from N=1000; Approx copied from Exact
bench_col2_rev <- bind_rows(
  beast_exact_n1000_rev, beast_approx_n1000_rev,
  new_n1000 %>% filter(q_regime == "reversible") %>% select(-q_regime)
) %>%
  mutate(method = factor(method, levels = method_levels))

# Column 2, Row 2 — Non-reversible: Exact, torchtree, and treeflow from N=1000; Approx copied from Exact
bench_col2_nonrev <- bind_rows(
  beast_exact_n1000_nonrev, beast_approx_n1000_nonrev,
  new_n1000 %>% filter(q_regime == "nonreversible") %>% select(-q_regime)
) %>%
  mutate(method = factor(method, levels = method_levels))
```

### Figure

```{r benchmark-figure, fig.width=10, fig.height=8}
library(grid)
loadCmuFonts()

fnt   <- "CMU Serif"
fsz   <- 10   # axis text
fszT  <- 12   # axis title / labels

# method_cols <- c(
#   "Exact"       = "#337538",
#   "Approximate" = "#009E73",
#   "torchtree"   = "#2F67B1",
#   "treeflow"    = "#F8766D",
#   "PhyloGrad"   = "#D4960A"
# )
method_cols <- c(
  "Exact"       = "#2F67B1",
  "Approximate" = "#2F67B1",
  "torchtree"   = "#9B4356",
  "treeflow"    = "#D67C2F",
  "PhyloGrad"   = "#D4960A"
)
darker_cols <- c("#E56B63", "#D26059", "#BF554F", "#AB4A45", "#973F3B")

maroon_cols <- c("#E06A68", "#C95D62", "#B2505C", "#9B4356", "#843650")
darker_orange_cols <- c(
  "#D67C2F",
  "#C66F25",
  "#B6621B",
  "#A65512",
  "#964909"
)
method_shps <- c(Exact = 16L, Approximate = 16L, torchtree = 16L, treeflow = 16L, PhyloGrad = 16L)
method_alpha <- c(Exact = 1, Approximate = 0.5, torchtree = 1, treeflow = 1, PhyloGrad = 1)
method_lty <- c(Exact = "solid", Approximate = "solid", torchtree = "dashed", treeflow = "dashed", PhyloGrad = "dashed")
method_lw <-  c(Exact = 1, Approximate = 0.8, torchtree = 0.5, treeflow = 0.5, PhyloGrad = 0.5)
ref_Ks <- c(8, 16, 32, 64, 128)

# K² anchored at Exact@K=128; K³ anchored at PhyloGrad (rev) or torchtree (nonrev)@K=128.
# Falls back to the last available K if K=128 is absent for the anchor method.
make_ref_lines <- function(data, regime) {
  get_anchor <- function(meth) {
    sub <- dplyr::filter(data, method == meth, K == 128L)
    if (nrow(sub) > 0) return(list(val = sub$median_ms[1], K = 128L))
    sub2 <- dplyr::filter(data, method == meth) %>% arrange(K)
    if (nrow(sub2) == 0) return(NULL)
    last <- tail(sub2, 1)
    list(val = last$median_ms[1], K = as.integer(last$K[1]))
  }
  k3_meth <- if (regime == "reversible") "PhyloGrad" else "torchtree"
  ea  <- get_anchor("Exact")
  k3  <- get_anchor(k3_meth)
  ref_df <- tibble()
  if (!is.null(ea))
    ref_df <- bind_rows(ref_df,
      tibble(K = ref_Ks, ref = "K^2", value = ea$val * (ref_Ks / ea$K)^2))
  if (!is.null(k3))
    ref_df <- bind_rows(ref_df,
      tibble(K = ref_Ks, ref = "K^3", value = k3$val * (ref_Ks / k3$K)^3))
  ref_df
}

bench_panel <- function(data, methods, x_title = FALSE, show_ref = TRUE,
                        regime = "reversible") {
  d <- filter(data, method %in% methods) %>%
       mutate(method = factor(method, levels = methods))
  ref_df <- if (show_ref) make_ref_lines(data, regime) else tibble()
  p <- ggplot(d, aes(K, median_ms, colour = method, shape = method,
                     alpha = method, linetype = method, linewidth = method))
  if (show_ref && nrow(ref_df) > 0) {
    p <- p +
      geom_line(data = ref_df, aes(x = K, y = value, group = ref),
                colour = "grey55", linewidth = 0.4, linetype = "22",
                inherit.aes = FALSE) +
      geom_text(data = dplyr::filter(ref_df, K == 128),
                aes(x = K, y = value, label = ref),
                colour = "grey40", size = 3.2, family = fnt,
                hjust = -0.5, inherit.aes = FALSE, parse = TRUE)
  }
  p <- p +
    geom_errorbar(
      aes(ymin = pmax(median_ms - sd_ms, 5e-3), ymax = median_ms + sd_ms),
      width = 0.06, linewidth = 0.35, alpha = 0.6
    ) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 0.7) +
    geom_point(
      data = d, #subset(d, method == "Approximate"),
      aes(x = K, y = median_ms),
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      colour = "white",
      alpha = 1,
      size = 3.4,
      stroke = 0
    ) +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    scale_x_continuous(
      trans  = "log2",
      breaks = c(8, 16, 32, 64, 128),
      labels = as.character(c(8, 16, 32, 64, 128)),
      expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.14))
    ) +
    scale_y_log10(
      breaks       = 10^(-2:5),
      labels       = scales::trans_format("log10", scales::math_format(10^.x)),
      minor_breaks = NULL
    ) +
    scale_colour_manual(values = method_cols[methods], name = NULL) +
    scale_shape_manual(values  = method_shps[methods],  name = NULL) +
    scale_alpha_manual(values  = method_alpha[methods],  name = NULL) +
    scale_linetype_manual(values = method_lty[methods], name = NULL) +
    scale_linewidth_manual(values = method_lw[methods], name = NULL) +
    labs(x = if (x_title) "K" else NULL, y = NULL) +
    theme_classic(base_size = fszT, base_family = fnt) +
    theme(
      aspect.ratio           = 1,
      panel.border           = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.5),
      panel.grid.major.y     = element_line(color = "grey90", linetype = "33", linewidth = 0.4),
      panel.grid.major.x     = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor       = element_blank(),
      axis.line              = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks             = element_line(linewidth = 0.3),
      axis.text              = element_text(size = fsz,  family = fnt, color = "black"),
      axis.title             = element_text(size = fszT, family = fnt, color = "black"),
      plot.margin            = margin(4, 14, 4, 4, "pt"),
      legend.position        = "none"
    )
  if (regime == "nonreversible") {
    tt_row <- dplyr::filter(data, method == "torchtree", K == 64L)
    ex_row <- dplyr::filter(data, method == "Exact",     K == 64L)
    if (nrow(tt_row) > 0 && nrow(ex_row) > 0) {
      y_from <- tt_row$median_ms[1] / 1.3
      y_to   <- ex_row$median_ms[1] * 1.5
      p <- p + annotate(
        "segment",
        x = 64, xend = 64, y = y_from, yend = y_to,
        colour = "black", linewidth = 0.3,
        arrow = arrow(type = "open", length = unit(0.05, "inches"))
      )
      y_mid   <- sqrt(y_from * y_to)   # geometric midpoint (log scale)
      ratio   <- round(tt_row$median_ms[1] / ex_row$median_ms[1])
      p <- p + annotate(
        "text",
        x = 64 * 1.08, y = y_mid,
        label = paste0(ratio, "x"),
        hjust = 0, vjust = 0.5,
        size = 3.2, family = fnt, colour = "black"
      )
    }
  }
  p
}

# ── Shared y-axis label ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
y_lab <- wrap_elements(
  grid::textGrob("Time (ms)", rot = 90,
                 gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = fszT, fontfamily = fnt))
)

# ── Row / column label helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────
rl <- function(lab) {
  ggplot() +
    annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, label = lab,
             angle = 90, size = 4, fontface = "bold",
             family = fnt, hjust = 0.5) +
    theme_void()
}
cl <- function(lab) {
  ggplot() +
    annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, label = lab,
             size = 4, fontface = "bold",
             family = fnt, hjust = 0.5) +
    theme_void()
}
```


```{r benchmark-figure, fig.width=10, fig.height=8}
# ── Shared 2-column legend ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Col 1: Exact, Approximate  |  Col 2: torchtree, treeflow, PhyloGrad
# Each entry: segment from x_start to x_start+0.06, point at midpoint, label after
c1x <- 0.26   # col 1 segment x-start
c2x <- 0.43   # col 2 segment x-start (tighter gap than before)
seg <- 0.025  # segment length (1/4 of original)
gap <- 0.018   # gap between segment end and label

leg_df <- tibble(
  method = factor(
    c("Exact", "Approximate", "torchtree", "treeflow", "PhyloGrad"),
    levels = names(method_cols)
  ),
  x_seg0 = c(c1x, c1x, c2x, c2x, c2x),
  x_pt   = c(c1x, c1x, c2x, c2x, c2x) + seg / 2,
  x_lab  = c(c1x, c1x, c2x, c2x, c2x) + seg + gap,
  y      = c(1.5,  0.5,  2.0,  1.0,  0.0)
)
leg_titles <- tibble(
  label = c("Proposed methods", "Benchmarks"),
  x     = c(c1x, c2x),
  y     = c(2.9, 2.9)
)
leg_panel <- ggplot(leg_df) +
  geom_text(data = leg_titles, aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
            hjust = 0, size = 3.5, family = fnt, fontface = "bold",
            colour = "grey10", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = x_seg0, xend = x_seg0 + seg,
                 y = y, yend = y,
                 colour = method,
                 alpha = method,
                 linetype = method
                 # linewidth = method
                 ),
               # linetype= "solid",
             linewidth = 0.8,
             show.legend = FALSE) +
  # geom_point(
  #   data = leg_df, #subset(leg_df, method == "Approximate"),
  #   aes(x = x_pt, y = y, shape = method),
  #   inherit.aes = FALSE,
  #   colour = "white",
  #   alpha = 1,
  #   size = 2.4,
  #   stroke = 0,
  #   show.legend = FALSE
  # ) +
  # geom_point(aes(x = x_pt, y = y,
  #                colour = method,
  #                shape = method,
  #                alpha = method),
  #            size = 2.7, show.legend = FALSE) +
  # geom_segment(aes(x = x_seg0, xend = x_seg0 + seg,
  #                  y = y, yend = y, colour = method),
  #              linewidth = 0.175, show.legend = FALSE) +
  # geom_point(aes(x = x_pt, y = y, colour = method, shape = method),
  #            size = 2.5, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_text(aes(x = x_lab, y = y, label = method),
            hjust = 0, size = 3.5, family = fnt, colour = "grey20") +
  scale_colour_manual(values = method_cols) +
  # scale_shape_manual(values  = method_shps) +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = method_alpha) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = method_lty) +
  # scale_linewidth_manual(values = method_lw) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.75)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.5, 3.3)) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# ── Panels ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
real    <- c("Exact", "Approximate", "torchtree", "treeflow", "PhyloGrad")
complex <- c("Exact", "Approximate", "torchtree", "treeflow")

# Col 1: actual N=100 data (Exact, torchtree, and PhyloGrad measured where available; remaining proposed values use placeholders)
# Cols 2–3: N=300 placeholder throughout
p11 <- bench_panel(bench_col1_rev,    real,    x_title = FALSE, regime = "reversible")
p12 <- bench_panel(bench_col2_rev,    real,    x_title = FALSE, regime = "reversible")
p13 <- bench_panel(bench_placeholder, real,    x_title = FALSE, regime = "reversible")
p21 <- bench_panel(bench_col1_nonrev, complex, x_title = TRUE,  regime = "nonreversible")
p22 <- bench_panel(bench_col2_nonrev, complex, x_title = TRUE,  regime = "nonreversible")
p23 <- bench_panel(bench_placeholder, complex, x_title = TRUE,  regime = "nonreversible")

# ── Assemble via design-string (cell spanning) ────────────────────────────────
# 5 cols × 4 rows | widths c(0.03, 0.05, 1, 1, 1) | heights c(0.06, 1, 1, 0.22)
#
#   #ABCD   ← col headers (A = spacer for row-label col)
#   EFGHI   ← Reversible row  (E = y_lab)
#   EJKLM   ← Non-reversible  (E spans rows 2-3)
#   #NOOO   ← legend spanning cols 3-5 (O)
#
# Plot order by first appearance: A B C D E F G H I J K L M N O
bench_fig <- wrap_plots(
  plot_spacer(),        # A
  cl("N = 100"),        # B
  cl("N = 1,000"),      # C
  cl("N = 10,000"),     # D
  y_lab,                # E  (spans rows 2-3, col 1)
  rl("Reversible"),     # F
  p11, p12, p13,        # G H I
  rl("Non-reversible"), # J
  p21, p22, p23,        # K L M
  plot_spacer(),        # N
  leg_panel,            # O  (spans cols 3-5, row 4)
  design = "
#ABCD
EFGHI
EJKLM
#NOOO
",
  widths  = c(0.06, 0.05, 1, 1, 1),
  heights = c(0.06, 1, 1, 0.22)
)

bench_fig
```

```{r benchmark-figure, fig.width=10, fig.height=8}
g_record(bench_fig,  width    = 10, height = 8)
```
```{r}
g_record(bench_fig,  width    = 10, height = 8)
```

```{r benchmark-save}
if (save_plots) {
  ggsave(
    filename = paste0(output_figures_path, "gradientBenchmark.pdf"),
    plot     = bench_fig,
    width    = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300
  )
}
```

# Gradient Benchmark — Reversible Only (seconds)

```{r benchmark-rev-seconds, fig.width=7, fig.height=5}
# Convert data to seconds for all three columns
to_sec <- function(d) mutate(d, median_ms = median_ms / 1e3, sd_ms = sd_ms / 1e3)

bench_col1_rev_s    <- to_sec(bench_col1_rev)
bench_col2_rev_s    <- to_sec(bench_col2_rev)
bench_placeholder_s <- to_sec(bench_placeholder)

bench_panel_s <- function(data, methods, x_title = FALSE, regime = "reversible") {
  d <- filter(data, method %in% methods) %>%
       mutate(method = factor(method, levels = methods))
  ref_df <- make_ref_lines(data, regime)
  ggplot(d, aes(K, median_ms, colour = method, shape = method,
                alpha = method, linetype = method, linewidth = method)) +
    geom_line(data = ref_df, aes(x = K, y = value, group = ref),
              colour = "grey55", linewidth = 0.4, linetype = "22", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
    geom_text(data = dplyr::filter(ref_df, K == 128),
              aes(x = K, y = value, label = ref),
              colour = "grey40", size = 3.2, family = fnt,
              hjust = -0.15, inherit.aes = FALSE, parse = TRUE) +
    geom_errorbar(
      aes(ymin = pmax(median_ms - sd_ms, 5e-6), ymax = median_ms + sd_ms),
      width = 0.06, linewidth = 0.35, alpha = 0.6
    ) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 0.7) +
    geom_point(data = d, aes(x = K, y = median_ms), inherit.aes = FALSE,
               colour = "white", alpha = 1, size = 3.4, stroke = 0) +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    scale_x_continuous(
      trans  = "log2",
      breaks = c(8, 16, 32, 64, 128),
      labels = as.character(c(8, 16, 32, 64, 128)),
      expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.14))
    ) +
    scale_y_log10(
      breaks       = 10^(-5:3),
      labels       = scales::trans_format("log10", scales::math_format(10^.x)),
      minor_breaks = NULL
    ) +
    scale_colour_manual(values = method_cols[methods], name = NULL) +
    scale_shape_manual(values  = method_shps[methods],  name = NULL) +
    scale_alpha_manual(values  = method_alpha[methods],  name = NULL) +
    scale_linetype_manual(values = method_lty[methods], name = NULL) +
    scale_linewidth_manual(values = method_lw[methods], name = NULL) +
    labs(x = if (x_title) "K" else NULL, y = NULL) +
    theme_classic(base_size = fszT, base_family = fnt) +
    theme(
      aspect.ratio       = 1,
      panel.border       = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.5),
      panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "grey90", linetype = "33", linewidth = 0.4),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
      axis.line          = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks         = element_line(linewidth = 0.3),
      axis.text          = element_text(size = fsz,  family = fnt, color = "black"),
      axis.title         = element_text(size = fszT, family = fnt, color = "black"),
      plot.margin        = margin(4, 14, 4, 4, "pt"),
      legend.position    = "none", 
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
      plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA)
    )
}

real_rev <- c("Exact", "Approximate", "torchtree", "treeflow", "PhyloGrad")

pr1 <- bench_panel_s(bench_col1_rev_s,    real_rev, x_title = TRUE, regime = "reversible")
pr2 <- bench_panel_s(bench_col2_rev_s,    real_rev, x_title = TRUE, regime = "reversible")
pr3 <- bench_panel_s(bench_placeholder_s, real_rev, x_title = TRUE, regime = "reversible")

y_lab_s <- wrap_elements(
  grid::textGrob("Time (s)", rot = 90,
                 gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = fszT, fontfamily = fnt))
)

# Rebuild legend with wider column spacing to avoid bold-title overlap in 7" panel
s_c1x <- 0.18; s_c2x <- 0.52
leg_df_s <- tibble(
  method = factor(real_rev, levels = names(method_cols)),
  x_seg0 = c(s_c1x, s_c1x, s_c2x, s_c2x, s_c2x),
  x_lab  = c(s_c1x, s_c1x, s_c2x, s_c2x, s_c2x) + seg + gap,
  y      = c(1.5, 0.5, 2.0, 1.0, 0.0)
)
leg_titles_s <- tibble(label = c("Proposed methods", "Benchmarks"),
                       x = c(s_c1x, s_c2x), y = c(2.9, 2.9))

leg_panel_s <- ggplot(leg_df_s) +
  geom_text(data = leg_titles_s, aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
            hjust = 0, size = 3.5, family = fnt, fontface = "bold",
            colour = "grey10", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = x_seg0, xend = x_seg0 + seg, y = y, yend = y,
                   colour = method, alpha = method, linetype = method),
               linewidth = 0.8, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_text(aes(x = x_lab, y = y, 
                label = dplyr::recode(as.character(method),
      "PhyloGrad" = "PhyloGrad (only reversible)")),
            hjust = 0, size = 3.5, family = fnt, colour = "grey20") +
  scale_colour_manual(values = method_cols) +
  scale_alpha_manual(values  = method_alpha) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = method_lty) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.85)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.5, 3.3)) +
  theme_void() + theme(legend.position = "none")

cl <- function(x) {
  ggplot() +
    annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.2, label = x,
             size = 4.5, family = fnt, fontface = "bold") +
    xlim(0, 1) + ylim(0, 1) +
    theme_void() +
    theme(plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0, "pt"))
}

bench_fig_rev_s <- wrap_plots(
  cl("N = 100"),      # A
  cl("N = 1,000"),    # B
  cl("N = 10,000"),   # C
  y_lab_s,            # D
  pr1,                # E
  pr2,                # F
  pr3,                # G
  leg_panel_s,        # H  (spans cols 2-4)
  design = "#ABC
DEFG
#HHH
",
  widths  = c(0.11, 1, 1, 1),
  heights = c(0.1, 0.5, 0.15)
)

bench_fig_rev_s
g_record(bench_fig_rev_s,  width    = 7, height = 4)
```

```{r benchmark-rev-seconds-save}
if (save_plots) {
  ggsave(
    filename = paste0(output_figures_path, "gradientBenchmarkRevSeconds.pdf"),
    plot     = bench_fig_rev_s,
    width    = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300
  )
}
```
